title: Skills
intro: As a versatile developer specialising in Mobile (Swift, React Native), Back-End (Python/Django) and Data & AI, my technical expertise spans native iOS engineering, full-stack web development, machine learning and LLM integration.
introHard: The hard skills below reflect technologies I have applied across real production projects — from a live Django/PostgreSQL web platform and commercial mobile applications to ML models and generative AI integrations.
introSoft: Soft skills play a crucial role in my professional competence, enabling me to interact effectively with colleagues and adapt to changing conditions. I know how to organise my work, show initiative, and collaborate in teams. These qualities help me find optimal solutions in complex situations and contribute to team success.

hardSkills.name: Swift & iOS Development
hardSkills.description: Native iOS development using Swift, SwiftUI and UIKit. Experience building commercial-grade applications with game logic, multi-language localisation (10 languages), offline multiplayer, achievements systems and Google AdMob monetisation.
hardSkills.example: Independently built a full commercial Tic-Tac-Toe mobile game in Swift — 3 difficulty levels, offline multiplayer, 10 localisations and AdMob integration, currently in final polishing before App Store release.

hardSkills.name: React Native & Expo
hardSkills.description: Cross-platform mobile development for iOS and Android with React Native and Expo. Integration of Firebase (authentication, Firestore, user profiles, session history) and LLM APIs for AI-driven features.
hardSkills.example: Built an AI Interview Prep application — users select a role and experience level, the app conducts a voice/text interview via Gemini/GPT API and generates a detailed performance report with strengths, weaknesses and recommendations.

hardSkills.name: LLM & Generative AI Integration
hardSkills.description: Integration of large language model APIs (Gemini, GPT) into production applications. Prompt engineering, RAG pipeline concepts (LangChain), fine-tuning awareness, and building AI agents. Certified in IBM Generative AI Engineering and IBM AI Engineering.
hardSkills.example: Integrated Gemini API into the AI Interview Prep mobile app for dynamic question generation and detailed answer evaluation, including voice analysis and personalised feedback.

hardSkills.name: Python
hardSkills.description: Over 5 years of experience developing scripts and web applications using Python. Since 2022 I have used Python professionally for freelance projects — web platforms, automation scripts, Telegram bots, data scrapers and ML model development.
hardSkills.example: Built automation scripts for task scheduling, server/email verification and data scraping. Developed Telegram bots and used Pandas, NumPy and Scikit-learn for ML pipelines.

hardSkills.name: Django and PostgreSQL
hardSkills.description: Production web application development with Django and PostgreSQL. Full-cycle delivery from architecture and back-end logic to deployment and maintenance. Currently running a live platform at eurasieanalyse.fr.
hardSkills.example: Independently designed, built and deployed eurasieanalyse.fr — a full geopolitical publishing platform with user auth, personalised notifications, profiles, dynamic content and HTMX-powered interactions.

hardSkills.name: Data Science
hardSkills.description: Applied Data Science tools for data analysis and visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn, as well as creating machine learning models. Used Jupyter Notebooks to create interactive reports and conduct experiments.
hardSkills.example: Developed data analyses and visualizations based on real data using Seaborn to identify hidden trends.

hardSkills.name: Machine Learning & Computer Vision
hardSkills.description: Experience working with AI and computer vision, including creating neural networks and training models using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and image processing with OpenCV.
hardSkills.example: Developed an image analysis system using OpenCV to improve data visualization and automatic object classification.

hardSkills.name: Git, Postman, Virtualenv, VS Code, Sublime Text
hardSkills.description: Used these tools for project management, coding, and testing, ensuring secure and comfortable development.
hardSkills.example: I use Git for version control to track changes and coordinate team work. Postman was helpful for testing APIs in projects.

hardSkills.name: Blockchain & Natural Language Processing (NLP)
hardSkills.description: Experience working with blockchain technologies and natural language processing. Applied NLP models for text analysis and created blockchain-based solutions for secure data exchange.
hardSkills.example: In the Paris-Saclay project, I implemented data routing based on a P2P protocol using blockchain to enhance security.

softSkills.name: Organization and Work Discipline
softSkills.description: Able to structure tasks, manage my time efficiently, and monitor the execution of each work step, while maintaining high-quality standards.
softSkills.example: During the development of the Eurasie en Analyse website, I led the project from design to deployment, organizing the work carefully to avoid missing any details.

softSkills.name: Curiosity and Initiative
softSkills.description: I strive to learn new technologies and methods to find the best solutions for challenges. I show initiative by proposing and implementing improvements in projects.
softSkills.example: While working on the Paris-Saclay University project, I proposed and created a data routing map between users, optimizing information exchange directly without the need for server storage.

softSkills.name: Adaptability to Changes
softSkills.description: Able to quickly adapt to new requirements and changes in the project. I easily learn new tools and approaches to improve efficiency.
softSkills.example: In the Eurasie en Analyse project, I migrated to using PostgreSQL to optimize database performance, which improved the application’s speed.

softSkills.name: Responsiveness to Challenges
softSkills.description: I respond quickly to new challenges and find solutions to complex problems in a timely manner.
softSkills.example: At Paris-Saclay University, I quickly fixed a critical data processing error, minimizing the risk of data loss.

softSkills.name: Teamwork and Collaboration
softSkills.description: I work effectively in teams, maintaining open communication and achieving common goals.
softSkills.example: In the Eurasie en Analyse project, I collaborated closely with content editors to ensure smooth website operation and timely deployment of new features.

softSkills.name: Problem Solving
softSkills.description: I can analyze and solve complex problems using data and modern technologies.
softSkills.example: I optimized data analysis algorithms using Data Science tools like Pandas, resulting in faster data processing and better decision making.

meta.title: Skills – Iliya Glazunov
meta.description: Discover Iliya Glazunov's hard and soft skills, including expertise in Python, Django, Data Science, Machine Learning, Blockchain, and strong professional qualities such as teamwork, adaptability, and problem solving.
meta.keywords: skills, hard skills, soft skills, Python, Django, machine learning, blockchain, data science, teamwork, problem solving, Iliya Glazunov
